snippet.title: Death Of A Unicorn | Official Trailer 2 HD | A24
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/A24subscribe

From writer/director Alex Scharfman and starring Paul Rudd, Jenna Ortega, Will Poulter, Téa Leoni, and Richard E. Grant. DEATH OF A UNICORN – In Theaters March 28

RELEASE DATE: In Theaters March 28
DIRECTOR: Alex Scharfman
CAST: Paul Rudd, Jenna Ortega, Will Poulter, Téa Leoni, Richard E. Grant
